_note: SvelteKit route files (+page.svelte, +layout.svelte) get contextual type information for kit-injected props from ./$types.js. Upstream's svelte2tsx synthesizes a `type $$ComponentProps = {…}` alias at module scope AND annotates the `$props()` destructure with `: $$ComponentProps` — mirrored here. The destructure annotation is load-bearing: without it, `const { data } = $props()` picks up $props()'s loose return type, `data.chartData` collapses to `any`, and downstream generic-component inference (e.g. `<LineChart data={data.chartData} y={d => …}>`) loses TData, firing TS18046 on the arrow parameter.
